channel.title: Field Glass Notes
channel.description: Fresh takes for backyard birders and weekend twitchers.

item.title: "beginner binoculars birding" — separating signal from noise
item.description: Thousands of people search "beginner binoculars birding" every month. Most of what they find is recycled. Here is what holds up.

item.description: A quiet shift is underway in how backyard birders and weekend twitchers approach feeders — less maximalism, more maintenance.

item.description: Where money changes outcomes in migration — and the line items that are pure vanity.

item.title: What to watch next in ID Skills: five quiet shifts
